title: Connecting excel with monday using VBA

posts.author: haitham (haitham)
posts.cookedHtml:
hello all,
I am new to Monday, I have worked with excel VBA for some time.
where can I find simple integration documentations or code snippets for connecting vba with Monday 1 way post functions or 2 way communication ?
I have an excel file that new data gets uploaded to it by employees and would like to add an item on my board whenever that happened with details from the excel file.
The excel file takes data from many placed like SAP and other equipment.
